patch.value:
## Context

Search eval harness items pm-22x2 and pm-fhsg are closed. However, a grep for 'ndcg', 'mrr', 'precision', 'recall', or 'ground_truth' in src/ finds no results. The closed items may have been closed as 'deferred/post-v0.1' rather than shipped.

The `src/core/search/relevance.ts` module has the scoring primitives (cosine similarity) but no offline evaluation path.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `pm eval` command or `pm reindex --eval` subcommand runs golden-query set against current index
- [ ] Outputs nDCG@10, MRR@10 per query and aggregate
- [ ] Golden queries stored in `.agents/pm/search/eval-queries.json` (gittracked, human-curated)
- [ ] CI gate fails if nDCG drops below baseline by more than epsilon
- [ ] Supports both keyword and hybrid modes

## Evidence

- `src/core/search/relevance.ts` — cosine similarity + rerank helpers but no eval runner
- pm-22x2, pm-fhsg closed — check if actually shipped or deferred
- No `eval` command in `src/cli/commands/`
Search relevance eval harness: implement nDCG/MRR runner and gate in CI

pm-22x2 and pm-fhsg (golden-query eval harness) are closed but the harness was filed as a task/story, not necessarily shipped as a CI gate. There is no actual nDCG/MRR runner in src/core/search/ and no CI job measuring search quality regressions. This means relevance regressions from corpus changes, hybrid weight changes, or provider upgrades go undetected.

- `pm eval` command or `pm reindex --eval` subcommand runs golden-query set against current index
- Outputs nDCG@10, MRR@10 per query and aggregate
- Golden queries stored in `.agents/pm/search/eval-queries.json` (gittracked, human-curated)
- CI gate fails if nDCG drops below baseline by more than epsilon
- Supports both keyword and hybrid modes

value.note: Curated golden-query set for this repo

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Shipped the relevance eval harness as a first-class pm eval command. Pure metrics module src/core/search/eval.ts (nDCG@k, MRR@k, precision@k, recall@k over a binary-relevance golden set + parseEvalQuerySet validator). Command src/cli/commands/eval.ts loads <pmRoot>/search/eval-queries.json (git-tracked; gitignore negation added so the cache dir stays ignored), runs each query through the live search path, reports per-query + macro-aggregate metrics, and --fail-under turns it into a CI gate (prints report, exits non-zero on regression). Registered as a core command (enum-contracts + EVAL_FLAG_CONTRACTS + help-content + contracts fixture). Curated a 4-query golden set for this repo (aggregate nDCG 0.74). Builds on the now-superseded pm-22x2/pm-fhsg eval items. 100% coverage; sandbox-verified gate pass+fail.

patch.value: Search relevance eval harness (pm eval) shipped with nDCG/MRR runner + CI gate.

Implemented pm eval: an nDCG@k/MRR@k/precision@k/recall@k relevance runner over a git-tracked golden-query set (<pmRoot>/search/eval-queries.json), with --fail-under as a CI gate (non-zero exit on aggregate-nDCG regression). New pure module src/core/search/eval.ts + command src/cli/commands/eval.ts, registered as a core command (enum-contracts, EVAL_FLAG_CONTRACTS, help-content, contracts fixture). Validates the offline BM25 provider (pm-75k9) and any future provider/weight change. Docs in COMMANDS.md. 100/100/100/100 coverage; sandbox-verified.
